results.title: Refereeing: FUFA enhances West Nile officials, calls for more female match referees
results.description: Women across the West Nile sub-region have been challenged to join the refereeing ranks. This was the bold call as the Federation of Uganda Football Associations (FUFA) wrapped up a five-day beginners’ refereeing course for match officials from Zombo, Nebbi, Pakwach and Maracha districts. The intensive programme drew 33 participants including seven females, featured practical [...] The post Refereeing: FUFA enhances West Nile officials, calls for more female match referees appeared first on Kawowo Sports .

results.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Makes New Investment in Enbridge Inc $ENB
results.description: SG Americas Securities LLC bought a new stake in Enbridge Inc (NYSE:ENB – Free Report) (TSE:ENB) during the 1st quarter, according to the company in its most recent Form 13F filing with the Securities & Exchange Commission. The institutional investor bought 159,704 shares of the pipeline company’s stock, valued at approximately $8,646,000. Other hedge funds [...]
